nodes.title: Negative Prompt
widgets_values: ugly, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, deformed, disfigured, jpeg artifacts

nodes.title: Positive Prompt
widgets_values:
Prompt:
anime illustration of a shirtless muscular man with short afro hair and full beard, gold chain necklace, surprised excited expression, standing in a large empty industrial warehouse, exposed steel roof trusses, concrete floor, muted desaturated color palette, warm earth tones, cel shaded, flat shading, clean linework, cinematic composition, wide angle, dramatic natural lighting through windows, dust particles, editorial illustration style, highly detailed background architecture, 2D animation aesthetic

Guide: [Subgraph](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph)

## Model links (for local users)


**diffusion_models**

- [flux-2-klein-9b-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9b-fp8)

> Please visit BFL's repo, accept the agreement in the repo, and then download the models.

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein-9B/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors)

**vae**

- [flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── flux-2-klein-9b-fp8.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── flux2-vae.safetensors
```
## Report issue

Note: please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/zh-CN/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud ship stable builds; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

info.name: MegaWarp Auto-Queue Loop
info.description: Iterative video stylization via auto-queue. Each queue run reads the previous stylized frame from the output folder, computes flow to the next video frame, warps the previous style to align, blends with the current frame, color-matches to frame 0, diffuses at adaptive denoise, and saves the result back to the same folder. On frame 0 the Get Latest node returns the reference frame as fallback so the pipeline bootstraps cleanly.
info.usage: 1. Set Source Video path on VHS_LoadVideoPath. 2. Set Get Latest Image folder AND SaveImage filename_prefix to the same dedicated folder (e.g. megawarp_run_001). 3. Pick your SD checkpoint and prompts. 4. Enable Auto-Queue (right-click Queue button). 5. Hit Run. 6. Stop manually when frame count reaches your video length.
info.author: Trent (flippingsigmas)
